title: MagicBricks South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: MagicBricks South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About MagicBricks South Asia Partners:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks South Asia Partners!
